full_text:
Liu Sheng 劉勝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Sheng (劉勝). Liu Bei’s ancestor. Prince of Jing of Zhongshan. Son of Emperor Jing of Han. Liu Sheng was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Sheng lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
